name: property managers handling 10-20 rental properties tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 rental properties, inefficient scheduling causes missed inspections. We automate the workflow instead of manual scheduling via email or phone calls.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling and communication for property inspections
